strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and data infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum with breadth
Hands-on AI/agentic infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing current engagement with the AI tooling space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and builder mindset via GISCollective (founded, open-source, still active), conference talks, and community workshops
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — six months at re:cinq is the entirety of direct AI work; no demonstrated products or platforms built with AI at meaningful scale
No evidence of operating at director-level IC scope: no cross-org technical strategy, no advisory relationships with customers or partners, and no cloud platform architecture at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and current career gap (Oct 2025–present) raise questions about readiness for a high-visibility principal-level role requiring recognized external expertise
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically broad and capable engineer whose career length clears the minimum bar, and his recent work on MCP tooling and agentic frameworks shows genuine interest in the AI space. However, this role demands recognized, deep AI expertise with shipped products or platforms at scale, cloud architecture leadership, and the ability to advise strategic customers — none of which are evidenced in the resume. His experience skews toward individual contributor delivery rather than the cross-organizational technical strategy and external thought leadership the principal-level position requires, making him a poor fit for the role as defined.
